candidate_lesson: When the 30-indicator consensus shows conv=100% LONG but green_matches=0 and hist_hr=0%, the signal is a structurally unbacked extreme — do not size up on consensus conviction without historical pattern confirmation.
testable_rule: if consensus_conviction >= 0.90 and green_matches == 0 and hist_hr <= 0.10: size_multiplier *= 0.5  # untested extreme, halve exposure
reason: Rule filters only 0 trades — insufficient sample
